mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY increase in real GDP growth rate signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply chain that compresses profit margins and reduces corporate investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 50-bps increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that raises discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% YoY increase in the unemployment rate signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% YoY increase in real disposable personal income signals a strengthening consumer sector that boosts corporate profits and equity prices, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% YoY decline in industrial production signals a weakening supply chain that compresses profit margins and reduces corporate investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 25-bps decrease in the federal funds rate signals a loosening monetary cycle that lowers discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in loosening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.2% YoY increase in the labor force participation rate signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer spending and corporate profits, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
